rules.title: Agent starts from XGraph index
rules.statement: Before editing code, agents read the context index, choose the closest task card, then inspect related module, flow, and rule cards.
checkHints: Keep AGENTS.md short and route detailed behavior through .doc/index.json.
Do not replace progressive context loading with whole-repository scanning.

rules.title: Semantic memory needs confirmation
rules.statement: Curated module summaries, risk rules, and confirmed module partitions require explicit user confirmation.
checkHints: Ask before changing curated semantic memory.
Deterministic facts, catalogs, and generated project facts may be rebuilt by XGraph.

rules.title: Managed blocks preserve user text
rules.statement: Entry files, gitignore, and hooks may only be updated inside XGraph managed blocks unless the user explicitly asks for wider edits.
checkHints: Repeated init or hook install commands must be idempotent.
Never discard user-authored content around managed blocks.
